sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97633" key="sugkatazw=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατα-ζῶ</orth>, <sense id="n97633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spend one's life with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.749e</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
